summary: Complete testing of FitMaxPro Live Request Form feature - All backend API tests passed (6/6), Frontend UI fully verified with category/exercise type selection and admin view
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/live/request - Creates request with category only
Backend: POST /api/live/request - Creates request with category AND exercise_type
Backend: POST /api/live/request - Requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/live/requests - User sees own requests only
Backend: GET /api/live/requests - Admin sees ALL pending requests
Backend: Request object has all fields (category, category_label, exercise_type, exercise_label, status)
Frontend: LiveStreamPage loads correctly for non-admin users
Frontend: 'Request Live' button visible for non-admin subscribers
Frontend: Request form shows 10 category buttons (Mass Gain, Weight Loss, Legs, Women Program, Abs, Yoga & Stretching, Cardio & HIIT, Nutrition & Tips, Q&A Session, Other)
Frontend: Request form shows 6 exercise type buttons (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Warm-up, Stretching, Technique & Form)
Frontend: Category selection highlights button in purple
Frontend: Exercise type selection highlights button in green
Frontend: Preview section shows 'Preview of your request: [Category] - [Exercise Type]'
Frontend: Custom title and message inputs available
Frontend: Send Request button submits to backend
Frontend: Success toast 'Request sent to coach!' displayed after submission
Frontend: Admin sees 'Start Live' button (not 'Request Live')
Frontend: Admin sees 'Live Requests' section with pending count badge
Frontend: Admin sees all pending requests with user name, title, message, and Accept button

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified - form, category selection, exercise type, preview, submission, admin view)

seed_data_creation: Created test users via MongoDB: regular user (subscription_tier: standard, role: user) and admin user (subscription_tier: vip, role: admin). Created 3 test live requests with various categories and exercise types.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Request feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/live/request accepts category, exercise_type, category_label, exercise_label fields. GET /api/live/requests returns user's own requests (non-admin) or all requests (admin). Frontend: LiveStreamPage.js shows 'Request Live' button for non-admin users which opens a form with 10 category options and 6 exercise type options. Preview section shows selected options before submission. Admin view shows 'Live Requests' section with all pending requests and 'Accept' buttons.

live_request_form.Category selection (10 themes): YES - Mass Gain, Weight Loss, Legs, Women Program, Abs, Yoga & Stretching, Cardio & HIIT, Nutrition & Tips, Q&A Session, Other
live_request_form.Exercise type selection (6 types): YES - Beginner Level, Intermediate Level, Advanced Level, Warm-up, Stretching, Technique & Form
live_request_form.Preview section: YES - Shows 'Preview of your request: [Category] - [Exercise Type]'

backend_api.POST /api/live/request: YES - Creates request with category, exercise_type, labels, message
backend_api.GET /api/live/requests: YES - User sees own, Admin sees all

admin_view.Start Live button: YES - Admin sees 'Start Live' instead of 'Request Live'
admin_view.Live Requests section: YES - Shows all pending requests with Accept button
admin_view.Request details: YES - Shows user name, title, message, timestamp
